About: It is about the political positions of Václav Klaus.
It is about the ideology of the Civic Democratic Party (ODS).
It is about neologisms invented by Klaus.
It is about the political ideology of Václav Klaus.
It is about opposition to perceived trends in Western politics.
It is about a fight for realistic policies that solve problems and do not serve dogmatic ideologies.
It is about the legacy of Václav Klaus.
It is about the four principles that ODS supports.
It is about neologisms coined by Václav Klaus.
It is about Klaus's opposition to modern isms.
